title: .saasaloy/manifest.json — managed-file tracking
description: Records every file a module applied — copied source files and copied skill files — with the owning module and a content hash, so update/remove know exactly what to undo. Replaces in-file `// saasaloy:managed` markers (build spec §2.9 / §3.2). The base writes no manifest; it is created by the first `saasaloy add`.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor validation.

managed.description: Project-relative file path → the module that owns it and a content hash. On update the tool re-hashes the file: match → safe overwrite; drift → route to AI-merge.

module.description: Name of the module that applied this file.

hash.description: sha256 hex digest of the file's content as written.

links.description: Optional link map (source path → link path). Present for forward compatibility; base/module applies do not populate it.
